message:
Fix DOM nesting violations for React warnings (#5107) Replace

tags with

or where they could contain block-level content (SVG icons, conditional renders). This eliminates React DOM nesting warnings flagged by the auto-QA scanner across CardHistory, PageErrorBoundary, Tour, Onboarding, AlertRuleEditor, and AlertDetail components. Fixes #5095 Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson
